semantic.role: Document the release history and notable changes for the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Listing added features for each version
outOfScope: Bug fix descriptions beyond reliability notes

English.purpose: To provide a concise record of the public release notes for ArchSpine, detailing what was added, reliability improvements, and documentation updates.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for users and developers of ArchSpine who need to track version changes and understand new capabilities.
key_takeaways: Initial open-source release of ArchSpine CLI and local .spine/ control plane
Core workflows include try, init, build, sync, publish, check, fix, and mcp start
Reliability features: protected output boundaries, atomic file writes, lock-based mutual exclusion
Documentation available in English and Simplified Chinese

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 记录 ArchSpine 项目的公开发布说明，详细列出新增功能、可靠性改进和文档更新。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向需要跟踪版本变更并了解新功能的 ArchSpine 用户和开发者。
key_takeaways: ArchSpine CLI 及本地 .spine/ 控制平面的首个开源版本发布
核心工作流包括 try、init、build、sync、publish、check、fix 和 mcp start
可靠性特性：受保护的输出边界、原子化文件写入、基于锁的互斥机制
文档提供英文和简体中文版本
